key_events_next_24h.name: FOMC Rate Decision (Hold Expected, Powell Final Meeting)
key_events_next_24h.note: Rate hold at 3.50-3.75% near-certain (CME FedWatch 100%). Pre-event uncertainty weighing on BTC. Hold priced in — no immediate shock expected from the decision itself.

key_events_next_24h.name: Fed Chair Powell Press Conference
key_events_next_24h.note: Powell's likely final meeting as Fed chair. Hawkish tone risk elevated with Brent crude >$104 and CPI at 3.3% YoY. Forward guidance tone is the key catalyst for crypto direction.

key_events_next_24h.name: Spot BTC ETF Daily Flow Report
key_events_next_24h.note: Yesterday saw $263M in outflows — first significant outflow in weeks. Monitoring whether this continues or reverses; key signal for institutional sentiment.

key_events_next_24h.name: US-Iran / Hormuz Watch (Ongoing)
key_events_next_24h.note: Hormuz restrictions ongoing, Brent >$104/barrel. No resolution imminent. Sustained oil pressure keeps inflation concerns elevated, reducing Fed dovish pivot probability.

notes: BTC $76K 하락, FOMC 오늘 금리동결 예상, ETF 유출 전환

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$76,317 as of Apr 29 00:38 UTC. Down from $78,661 Monday open (-3.1%). Failed $80K resistance twice in past week. Support ~$75,000 (100-day MA area).
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: mid-range (recovered from 29 Fear on Apr 20 to 62 Greed on Apr 25, now pulling back)
BTC down ~3.1% from Monday open ahead of FOMC (Apr 29 decision 18:00 UTC)
Spot BTC ETF outflows: $263M yesterday — breaking recent positive streak, bearish signal
BTC dominance crossed 60% (Apr 22), peaked 60.66% (Apr 25) — altcoins underperform
Negative Coinbase premium index — weakening US spot demand
Twice rejected at $80K resistance — technical ceiling intact
KelpDAO exploit: $292M stolen, $14B DeFi TVL exodus (Apr 20) — DeFi sentiment depressed
Brent crude >$104/barrel (Hormuz restrictions) — inflation pressure sustained
FOMC Apr 29: decision at 18:00 UTC, press conference 18:30 UTC — key macro catalyst today
No CPI/PPI releases in next 24h (CPI Apr: May 12; PPI Apr: May 13)
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC decision at 18:00 UTC today (Apr 29). Rate hold near-certain but Powell press conference (18:30 UTC) is key risk — forward guidance on inflation outlook matters. Oil >$104 reduces likelihood of dovish tone. ETF outflows turning negative and $80K double rejection reinforce bearish short-term bias. Waiting for FOMC clarity before directional positioning is prudent.
analysis.regime_rationale: Bearish (0.60): BTC -3.1% from week high, failed $80K twice, ETF outflows $263M, negative Coinbase premium, Hormuz/oil headwinds, FOMC pre-event uncertainty. Partially offset by 60%+ BTC dominance (flight to quality within crypto) and rate hold being fully priced in (no rate shock expected). Confidence at 0.60 — macro filter ACTIVE. Avoid long entries until after FOMC press conference resolves directional uncertainty.
